title: Defiant (disambiguation)
content:
The name '''Defiant''' can refer to the following:

*[[Defiant (cruiser)|''Defiant'']] - A [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Krath Holy Crusade]].
*[[Defiant (Acclamator I-class)|''Defiant'']] - An [[Acclamator-class assault ship|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] serving the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*[[Defiant (Imperial-class)|''Defiant'']] - An [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] serving the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
You might also be looking for the vessels similarly named ''Defiance'':
*[[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']] - The [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]]
*[[Defiance (MC90 Star Cruiser)|''Defiance'']] - The [[MC90 Star Cruiser]]
